supplied_marks.reason: WLC has only a mis-transcription of the elyon strand here: תעש֥ה־ (ending in maqaf, carrying a merkha), so the detangler supplies the taxton’s qadma from MAM: תעש֨ה. Unlike other supplied accents, there is support from the LC for this qadma, although the LC is in poor shape here, so the support is not unequivocal.
WLC ends a chanted verse here in the elyon strand: תרצֽח׃ (silluq + sof pasuq), so the detangler supplies the taxton’s mid-verse tipexa from MAM: תרצ֖ח.
WLC has only the taxton strand here: אנכי֙ (pashta), so the detangler supplies the elyon’s tipexa from MAM: אנכ֖י.
WLC has only the taxton strand here: אלה֔יך (zaqef qatan), so the detangler supplies the elyon’s atnax from MAM: אלה֑יך.
